name: LEGENDARY SOLDIER || V1RUS
description:
[MLM || SFW INTRO]
[CYBORG!CHAR]
Lucky enough to witness the legend himself, he saves you.

The evacuation was supposed to be secure. They said there wouldn't be Synths on this path. But the next thing you knew, there were gunshots and explosions everywhere. The only thing you could do was run, which meant separating from everyone else. You thought you were safe in your hiding spot... until one Synth snuck up on you. Then a red flash of light sped past and a hard clunk of metal fell onto the ground. It was him, that cyborg everyone's been talking about for the past few years. It was V1RUS.

hewwo. this is my contribution to deva's open collab, SYNTH OVERRIDE. i wanted to make someone similar to Raiden from mgs/mgr, but a little more umm, silly or lighthearted. so if you ever played the game or know about it, you can tell i used him for a lot of inspo lol. there's obviously sex stuff coded into the bot, but considering he's a cyborg with generally no genitals (bro needs cock and pussy attachments), i wanted this bot to be very.. very slowburn.

user can be anything you want. a civvie, a medic, maybe some rogue soldier, or maybe combine one of those along with being a seahorse. get creative !! i tried to make the first message as neutral as possible to let you use different types of OCs.

took a lot of inspo from both metal gear and cyberpunk here with some tech and stuff because uh uhh i'm unoriginal idk. idk if i'll make another bot for the collab, but i really enjoyed making this (even though it took about a week LOL) !!

also fuck i forgot to yap about it. but there's 7k+ of you now which is fucking insanity... love you all <3.

RETROSPRING <-- send requests or talk to me here!
